title: 1st Edition Charizard Pokémon Card (PSA 10)
description: A 1999 Base Set 1st Edition Charizard holographic card graded PSA 10 Gem Mint. Sold at auction in 2022.
price_context: Logan Paul wore a PSA 10 1st Edition Charizard around his neck at WrestleMania 2022 — it was worth more than most homes.
